snippet.desc: Attach to an actor to make the camera follow it based on a "grid" that you specify the size of, only moving if the actor moves into another grid "box".
snippet.description: Attach to an actor to make the camera follow it based on a "grid" that you specify the size of, only moving if the actor moves into another grid "box".
snippet.name: Grid Camera Follow

number.desc: INTERNAL ATTRIBUTE: The x-position that the camera should be.
number.name: _intendedCameraX

number.desc: The width of the grid for the camera to follow.
number.name: _GridWidth

number.desc: INTERNAL ATTRIBUTE: The y-position that the camera should be.
number.name: _intendedCameraY

number.desc: The height of the grid for the camera to follow.
number.name: _GridHeight

number.desc: INTERNAL ATTRIBUTE: The current x-position of the camera.
number.name: _currentCameraX

number.desc: INTERNAL ATTRIBUTE: The current y-position of the camera.
number.name: _currentCameraY

number.desc: The speed, in pixels per frame, that the view should scroll by when moving from box to box. Leave as 0 to indicate an instant jump.
number.name: _ScrollSpeed
